summary.lv: Atea Global Services meklē Senior Software Developer savam Development & Engineering Studio Rīgā — sarežģītu, mērogojamu sistēmu izstrāde, tehniskā kvalitātes paaugstināšana un komandas mentorings hibridā darba formātā.
summary.en: Atea Global Services is hiring a Senior Software Developer for its Development & Engineering Studio in Riga — designing and building complex scalable systems, raising technical quality, and mentoring teammates in a hybrid work model.
